source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $AD \parallel BE \parallel CF$, $AB=3$, $AC=9$, $DE=2$, then what is the value of $EF$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Given that $AD\parallel BE\parallel CF$,\\
it follows that $\frac{AB}{BC}=\frac{DE}{EF}$,\\
Given that $AB=3$, $AC=9$, $DE=2$,\\
we have $BC=6$,\\
thus, $\frac{3}{6}=\frac{2}{EF}$,\\
therefore, $EF=\boxed{4}$.
